coverage_note: The bundled HFE population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from HFE iron sensing, transferrin receptor interaction, hepcidin regulation, and systemic iron homeostasis and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000010704: HFE coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: HFE findings should be read against iron sensing, transferrin receptor interaction, hepcidin regulation, and systemic iron homeostasis; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1800562 (HFE C282Y) is curated as a HFE marker for Hereditary hemochromatosis review context, Iron overload and hepcidin regulation; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs1799945 (HFE H63D) is curated as a HFE marker for Hereditary hemochromatosis review context, Iron overload and hepcidin regulation; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
